heading: Sunday
text: Snow likely from Rt. 4 north, with light to moderate accumulations. Snow mixed with rain south of I-89, turning into rain in the southern valleys. Highs in the 30s north, upper 30s to mid 40s south. Light south wind turning east.

heading: Sunday Night
text: Snow showers, mixing with rain south, turning over to snow as temperatures drop from north to south. Some of the warmer valleys west and south could see freezing rain before the system is out. Lows in the 20s north to near 30 south. North wind at 5 to 10 mph.

heading: Monday
text: A chance of snow, mixing with rain in southern valleys, then beginning to dissipate in the morning. Highs in the low to mid 30s north, upper 30s to near 40 south. Northwest wind at 5 to 15 mph.
